name: Starlink Group 17-43
description: A batch of 21 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation - SpaceX's project for space-based Internet communication system.  2 US military Starshield satellites are also on board.
program_description: Starlink is a satellite internet constellation operated by American aerospace company SpaceX
rocket_fact: Launch windows are strictly determined by orbital mechanics and collision avoidance requirements to hit a precise target.
